message:
chore: rename toon_rust dependency from "toon" to "tru" and update deps

The toon_rust crate was renamed from "toon" to "tru" upstream to avoid
conflicting with the coreutils tr command. Updates the dependency
declaration and refreshes Cargo.lock with latest dependency versions
including anyhow, clap_complete, and windows-sys downgrades for
compatibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
